title: EQ - Custom EQ, change the some values, Save EQ, dialog present, click OK
scenario: Custom EQ changes are not saved after clicking OK in the save confirmation dialog
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Adjust one or more frequency band sliders (e.g., increase 100 Hz or decrease 1 kHz)
expected: The Custom EQ settings are saved successfully, the dialog is dismissed, and the new EQ values are applied to the audio output.
